specific_question: When was the last time that Lee's Market checked on the readiness of its suppliers to comply with FSMA 204 rules on lot codes?
answer: Lee's Market hosted representatives from all of its major suppliers at the Q1 2025 Supplier Review Day, where FSMA 204 and its rules regarding lot codes were the main subject of discussion.
dr_question: How is Lee's Market positioned to communicate with all of its suppliers, big and small, concerning FSMA 204 regulations, specifically the tracking of Lot codes?
